_comment: Horizontal attack-path edges: a CONFIRMED/PARTIAL finding of class X -> ranked pivot candidates. Complements playbook.json (vertical: fingerprint->test). next_move.py ingests both. Candidates are SUGGESTIONS ONLY - nothing auto-executes; gate:'oob' marks blind/impactful edges needing an operator OOB callback before exploit. Score = 80 + 6*gain + round(8*likelihood) - {cheap:0,medium:3,expensive:6}[cost]. Class names must be in coverage-classes.json + CLASS_ALIASES vocab. Add edges, no code.

then.move: pivot SSRF on {asset} -> cloud metadata (169.254.169.254) + internal-only services
escalate IDOR on {asset} -> ATO: swap victim id on auth/profile/reset endpoints
SQLi on {asset} -> RCE: stacked queries / xp_cmdshell / INTO OUTFILE webshell
upload webshell on {asset} -> RCE (bypass ext/mime filter)
reuse {asset} default cred against other in-scope auth surfaces
post-ex from RCE on {asset}: loot creds, enum internal, pivot
